description: Every agent decision, finding, improvement, and fix MUST be registered on GitHub as durable artifacts (Issues, PRs, workflows, docs). The system must function autonomously even without AI assistance.

vision.goal: Build self-sustaining automation that works without AI. AI improves the system, but the system runs on its own.
vision.principle: If it's only in an AI conversation, it doesn't exist. If it's on GitHub, it's permanent.

maturityLevels.name: AI-Dependent
maturityLevels.description: AI does everything, workflows are basic triggers

maturityLevels.name: AI-Assisted
maturityLevels.description: Workflows handle routine tasks, AI handles exceptions and improvements

maturityLevels.name: AI-Supervised
maturityLevels.description: Workflows handle most tasks including self-healing, AI reviews and optimizes

maturityLevels.name: AI-Optional
maturityLevels.description: System fully autonomous. AI enhances but is not required for daily operations

findings.rule: Every problem detected by any agent MUST become a GitHub Issue with severity and recommended fix

improvements.rule: Every improvement MUST follow Issue → Branch → PR → Quality Gate → Merge pipeline

fixes.rule: Every fix MUST reference the Issue it resolves. Auto-close Issue on merge.

decisions.rule: Architecture and strategic decisions MUST be recorded as Issues with rationale and alternatives considered

patterns.rule: Every new failure pattern MUST be added to resilience-patterns.json AND documented in an Issue for traceability

monitoring.rule: Every monitoring check MUST be a GitHub Actions workflow (not just an AI prompt). Workflows run on schedule even without AI.

knowledge.where: Markdown files in repo OR workflow comments
knowledge.rule: Operational knowledge MUST be codified in repo files, not just session memory. Session memory is supplementary, not primary.

workflowAutonomyGoals.description: Each workflow category should progressively become self-sufficient

monitoring.current: Workflows detect issues, create Issues, AI fixes
monitoring.target: Workflows detect issues, auto-fix via workflow, create Issue as record

cicd.current: CI failures detected, AI diagnoses and fixes
cicd.target: CI failures auto-diagnosed by workflow, auto-fixed by workflow, AI reviews result

security.current: Security scan finds issues, AI evaluates and fixes
security.target: Security scan auto-classifies, auto-fixes low/medium, creates Issues for high/critical

releases.target: Workflows detect version-worthy changes, auto-bump, auto-release, AI reviews

dashboard.target: Workflows auto-detect stale data, auto-refresh, auto-validate accuracy

recovery.current: Resilience patterns matched by AI, fallback chains executed
recovery.target: Workflows match patterns automatically, execute fallback chains, AI learns new patterns

auditTrail.rule: Every state change MUST have: who (agent), what (action), when (timestamp), why (Issue link), result (success/failure)

progressTracking.definition: Percentage of operations completed without AI intervention
